title: How A Beauty Company Built An AI Agent — With Rachel Williamson and Josh Siebert
summary: Ulta Beauty deployed ServiceNow's AI-powered HR platform across 65,000 employees, focusing on decisions about automation versus human involvement. The implementation changed hiring plans and is expanding to onboarding and employee lifecycle management.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Rachel Williamson and Josh Siebert about Ulta Beauty's deployment of ServiceNow's AI-powered HR platform across 65,000 employees. The discussion centers on where the company chose automation versus human involvement, the human-in-the-loop decisions that shaped the rollout, and how the implementation altered hiring plans. The platform is expanding from its initial scope into onboarding and broader employee lifecycle management, illustrating how an enterprise AI agent moves from pilot to operational use.
